text.title: skills Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for skills as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Skill not triggering — the `/` menu doesn't show it or it doesn't auto-invoke.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Check the `description` field. It must include specific trigger keywords; vague descriptions fail auto-selection. Test with more distinctive keywords.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use spaces not tabs. Check `---` delimiters are exact. YAML is sensitive to indentation.

failure-mode.description: Skill not found or "file not found" error.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Filename must be exactly `SKILL.md` (case-sensitive). Check directory structure and restart Claude Code.

failure-mode.description: Tools not working (e.g., Bash returns permission error).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Check `allowed-tools` syntax. Missing `:*` suffix breaks Bash patterns. Test with `allowed-tools: Bash(*)` to verify.

failure-mode.description: Skill context is too large (over 300 lines) and consumes too many tokens.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Split into SKILL.md (auto-loaded) + reference.md (on-demand). Never go three levels deep (A→B→C breaks partial reads).

failure-mode.description: Skills do not inherit the parent conversation's tool permissions; `allowed-tools` must be explicitly declared.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Test tool permissions before deploying. A skill without explicit permissions defaults to inheriting, which may be unexpected.

failure-mode.description: When `context: fork` is set, the skill runs with no prior history. Required context must be passed through the skill prompt, not from earlier messages.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Forked skills are isolated; they don't see prior conversation. Pass all necessary context explicitly.

failure-mode.description: The `Skill` tool requires user permission the first time per session. Automated pipelines halt for human input.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-approve Skill tool in your setup, or use explicit prompt guidance to let users approve upfront.

failure-mode.description: If a skill calls another skill without `context: fork`, the inner skill can read the outer conversation, causing unintended context pollution.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use `context: fork` for nested skill calls to isolate contexts.

failure-mode.description: The `model` field in frontmatter is advisory. Claude Code may downgrade or override depending on the active plan.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Do not rely on `model: claude-opus` being honored in all environments. Assume model may vary.
